description: Enhanced Group Inc. designs and produces multisport live events under the Enhanced Games brand in the United States. It also engages in distributing digital content through various channels, social media, and streaming platforms; and operation of Live Enhanced, a consumer wellness platform. In addition, the company offers a personalized TRT protocol designed to support drive, energy, and vitality under the Stronger+ brand; clinician-guided longevity pathway comprising treatments, such as injectable NAD+, liposomal NAD+, and injectable Sermorelin under the Longer+ brand; and female hormone ther
